title: Mario Paint Composer - King's Quest V Town Theme
description:
ONE MILLION DOLLAR BUDGET.

Yeah, I'm still alive. Moved several months ago. Moving again now. YouTube is still shit though, good to know!

I've still got a couple basic MPC projects in the pipeline that may yet see the light of day. I'm running kind of dry on what I can feasibly transpose without entirely too much time and effort, though.
